description: KPK USDC Prime is a Morpho Vault V2 ERC4626 vault that allocates USDC deposits across selected Morpho Blue lending markets via the Markets V1 Adapter. A 5-of-8 Safe holds ownership (setCurator, setIsSentinel), while KPK's 2-of-5 multisig acts as curator — submitting timelocked adapter, cap, and fee changes. Day-to-day rebalancing is performed by any of four allocators: the KPK 2/5 multisig and three individual KPK operator EOAs.

eth:0x354C92aF243d53A24feb3dFF20372Af7b7.name: KPK 5/8 Owner Safe
eth:0x354C92aF243d53A24feb3dFF20372Af7b7.description: Vault owner. Can replace the curator and grant/revoke sentinel roles. Controls {{ownerCapital}} in reachable capital.

eth:0xf8182E5827c06a47A985eC565A3bcd5643.name: KPK 2/5 Multisig (Curator & Allocator)
eth:0xf8182E5827c06a47A985eC565A3bcd5643.description: Curator and allocator. Submits timelocked operations for adapter additions, cap increases, and fee changes, and executes day-to-day asset allocation to adapters within configured caps. Controls {{curatorCapital}} in reachable capital.

eth:0xF0Cf1e3Ec6264b03241826f5b2aBda17B4.name: KPK Operator EOA
eth:0xF0Cf1e3Ec6264b03241826f5b2aBda17B4.description: KPK operator EOA with the allocator role. Can call allocate and deallocate on the vault within configured caps.

eth:0x331D9C769185AE25233314859d53c2b920.name: KPK Operator EOA (Vault Deployer)
eth:0x331D9C769185AE25233314859d53c2b920.description: KPK operator EOA that deployed the vault, also holds the allocator role. Can call allocate and deallocate within configured caps.

eth:0xAF150c6d108D0C2c96BbFC3CeF9B4848b5.name: KPK Operator EOA
eth:0xAF150c6d108D0C2c96BbFC3CeF9B4848b5.description: KPK operator EOA with the allocator role. Can call allocate and deallocate on the vault within configured caps.

eth:0x1d511811ACA9d8817a3e50F29CadFf6243.name: Markets V1 Adapter
eth:0x1d511811ACA9d8817a3e50F29CadFf6243.description: Routes vault deposits directly into individual Morpho Blue V1 markets without passing through an intermediate V1 vault. All vault capital flows through this adapter into Morpho Blue.

eth:0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37.name: Morpho Blue
eth:0xBBBBBbbBBb9cC5e90e3b3Af64bdAF62C37.description: The immutable Morpho Blue lending protocol where all vault deposits ultimately land as supply positions.

eth:0x36Cb058364a811636685ef15a71E8ea990.name: rETH/USDC Oracle
eth:0x36Cb058364a811636685ef15a71E8ea990.description: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 computing the rETH/USDC collateral price from rETH/ETH × ETH/USD / USDC/USD Chainlink feeds.

eth:0xE8aDfF9117151fb5ad7313873780b87cC5.name: OETH/USDC Oracle
eth:0xE8aDfF9117151fb5ad7313873780b87cC5.description: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 computing the OETH/USDC collateral price using ETH/USD / USDC/USD feeds (OETH treated as 1:1 ETH).

eth:0xA6D6950c9F177F1De7f7757FB33539e3Ec.name: cbBTC/USDC Oracle
eth:0xA6D6950c9F177F1De7f7757FB33539e3Ec.description: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 computing the cbBTC/USDC collateral price from the Chainlink BTC/USD feed.

eth:0xDddd770BADd886dF3864029e4B377B5F6a.name: WBTC/USDC Oracle
eth:0xDddd770BADd886dF3864029e4B377B5F6a.description: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 computing the WBTC/USDC collateral price from WBTC/BTC × BTC/USD / USDC/USD Chainlink feeds.

eth:0x48F7E36EB6B826B2dF4B2E630B62Cd25e8.name: wstETH/USDC Oracle
eth:0x48F7E36EB6B826B2dF4B2E630B62Cd25e8.description: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 computing the wstETH/USDC collateral price from wstETH/ETH / USDC/ETH Chainlink feeds.

eth:0x57bfdF6aB73995C5af58A95A16798190e3.name: LBTC/USDC Oracle
eth:0x57bfdF6aB73995C5af58A95A16798190e3.description: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 computing the LBTC/USDC collateral price from Redstone LBTC/USD / USDC/USD feeds.

eth:0xDCc04fFaCD7B49035cCdBbbA59a5f95594.name: cbBTC/USDC Oracle (alt)
eth:0xDCc04fFaCD7B49035cCdBbbA59a5f95594.description: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 computing an alternative cbBTC/USDC collateral price from Redstone cbBTC/USD × Chainlink BTC/USD feeds.

eth:0x0F948CBa8231Db7898ef36A4212581Ad7b.name: WETH/USDC Oracle
eth:0x0F948CBa8231Db7898ef36A4212581Ad7b.description: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 computing the WETH/USDC collateral price from the Chainlink ETH/USD feed.

eth:0x8200f6622bb906a78896a3da4ddc81ebc8.name: Chainlink rETH/ETH Price Feed
eth:0x8200f6622bb906a78896a3da4ddc81ebc8.description: Chainlink price feed providing the rETH/ETH exchange rate, used by the rETH/USDC oracle.

eth:0x5f4ec3df9cbd43714fe2740f5e3616155c.name: Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
eth:0x5f4ec3df9cbd43714fe2740f5e3616155c.description: Chainlink price feed providing the ETH/USD price, used by the rETH/USDC and OETH/USDC oracles.

eth:0x8fffffd4afb6115b954bd326cbe7b4ba57.name: Chainlink USDC/USD Price Feed
eth:0x8fffffd4afb6115b954bd326cbe7b4ba57.description: Chainlink price feed providing the USDC/USD price, used by rETH/USDC, OETH/USDC, and WBTC/USDC oracles.

eth:0xf4030086522a5beea4988f8ca5b36dbc97.name: Chainlink BTC/USD Price Feed
eth:0xf4030086522a5beea4988f8ca5b36dbc97.description: Chainlink price feed providing the BTC/USD price, used by cbBTC/USDC, WBTC/USDC, and cbBTC alt oracles.

eth:0xfdfd9c85ad200c506cf9e21f1fd8dd0193.name: Chainlink WBTC/BTC Price Feed
eth:0xfdfd9c85ad200c506cf9e21f1fd8dd0193.description: Chainlink price feed providing the WBTC/BTC exchange rate, used by the WBTC/USDC oracle.

eth:0x4f67e4d9bd67efa28236013288737d39ae.name: Chainlink wstETH/ETH Price Feed
eth:0x4f67e4d9bd67efa28236013288737d39ae.description: Chainlink price feed providing the wstETH/ETH exchange rate, used by the wstETH/USDC oracle.

eth:0x986b5e1e1755e3c2440e960477f25201b0.name: Chainlink USDC/ETH Price Feed
eth:0x986b5e1e1755e3c2440e960477f25201b0.description: Chainlink price feed providing the USDC/ETH price, used by the wstETH/USDC oracle.

eth:0xcf17f459f4d1d9e6fb5aa5013bd2d7eb60.name: Redstone LBTC/USD Price Feed
eth:0xcf17f459f4d1d9e6fb5aa5013bd2d7eb60.description: Redstone price feed providing the LBTC/USD price, used by the LBTC/USDC oracle.

eth:0x6a5a24455e5c9c288632944a88cea923e0.name: Redstone USDC/USD Price Feed
eth:0x6a5a24455e5c9c288632944a88cea923e0.description: Redstone price feed providing the USDC/USD price, used by the LBTC/USDC oracle.

eth:0xb415eaa355d8440ac7ecb602d3fb67ccc1.name: Redstone cbBTC/USD Price Feed
eth:0xb415eaa355d8440ac7ecb602d3fb67ccc1.description: Redstone price feed providing the cbBTC/USD price, used by the cbBTC/USDC alt oracle.

eth:0xc0053f3fbccd593758258334dfce24c2a9.name: Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
eth:0xc0053f3fbccd593758258334dfce24c2a9.description: Chainlink price feed providing the ETH/USD price, used by the WETH/USDC oracle.

eth:0x4Ef53d2cAa51C447fdFEEedee8F07FD196.name: KPK USDC Prime Vault (USDC)
eth:0x4Ef53d2cAa51C447fdFEEedee8F07FD196.description: The Morpho Vault V2 contract. Holds USDC supply positions in Morpho Blue markets across WETH, WBTC, wstETH, cbBTC, rETH, and OETH collateral.
